# Small Cube

A simple 3D cube primitive with equal dimensions on all sides.

## Model Description
This is a basic cube centered at the origin. It's one of the fundamental building blocks in 3D modeling and can be used as-is or as a starting point for more complex models.

## Parameters
- **size**: The length of each side of the cube (default: 10 units)

## Customization
You can adjust the `size` parameter to make the cube larger or smaller. The cube remains centered at the origin regardless of size.

## 3D Printing Notes
- This model is structurally sound for 3D printing
- All faces are flat and oriented correctly
- No support material needed
- Recommended layer height: 0.2mm
- Infill: 20-30% for a solid result
